data.body:
Addressing the two flagged criteria (both are stale-path/tooling artifacts, not unfinished work):

1) PATH RENAME: the AC names examples/claude-skills/rebar-brainstorm/SKILL.md, but the entire examples/claude-skills/ tree was renamed to examples/agent-skills/ AFTER this ticket was authored, by commit 7bba6dd7c 'agents-md migration: carnelian-ameboid-stinkbug: rename example skills claude-skills -> agent-skills + de-brand'. The required subsection therefore now lives at examples/agent-skills/rebar-brainstorm/SKILL.md:124-137 ('### Before recording tickets, read the project's plan-review gate'). Same file, new canonical path; the old path is intentionally gone.

2) DOCS-ONLY DIFF: the content landed via commit 1f3a61c4c, whose diff touches only the SKILL.md file (docs-only). git show --stat 1f3a61c4c confirms a single-file docs change; it carries rebar-ticket: c681-b7c5-d44d-495b and is reachable from HEAD.

This ticket duplicates the CLOSED c681-b7c5-d44d-495b, under which the work was tracked and landed. No code/docs work remains for db8c; the only mismatch is that the AC's literal path predates the claude-skills->agent-skills rename. Closing as duplicate/superseded.
